seoTitle: Create QR Codes Inside HubSpot CRM: Setup Guide
metaDescription: Generate and automate QR codes inside HubSpot using a marketplace app, then map dynamic links to contact records and track offline-to-online scans.
intro: HubSpot doesn't generate QR codes natively, so you'll need a certified marketplace app to bridge that gap and render the images on your CRM timeline. This guide covers installing that app, creating a property to store the generated image, and building a workflow that produces a QR code automatically when a contact enrolls. It's useful for connecting offline touchpoints, like business cards or flyers, back to campaign tracking.

steps.heading: Install a certified QR app
steps.body: Open the HubSpot App Marketplace, search for an approved QR extension, and complete the OAuth installation.

steps.heading: Create a property for the QR image
steps.body: In CRM Data Settings, add a new contact or company property to hold the generated image URL.

steps.heading: Build an enrollment workflow
steps.body: Launch a new workflow and set up a contact or company enrollment trigger to kick off QR generation.

steps.heading: Choose your QR output type
steps.body: Pick between dynamic URL, SMS, Wi-Fi, or vCard business card templates depending on what you want the code to do.

steps.heading: Map the generated code back to the record
steps.body: Add an Edit Record step so the workflow writes the new QR image URL into the contact property you created.

steps.heading: Track scans with tracking URLs
steps.body: Use standard tracking links in your QR generation so scans feed real-time metrics back to your campaign dashboards.

faq.question: Does HubSpot generate QR codes without a third-party app?
faq.answer: No, it requires a certified marketplace app to render QR image files directly on CRM timelines.

faq.question: Can I create a vCard QR code for business cards?
faq.answer: Yes, you can map CRM variables like name and email to build a dynamic vCard-based QR code.

faq.question: How do I track offline QR code scans?
faq.answer: Using standard tracking URLs inside your QR generation lets scan data flow back into your campaign dashboards.

faq.question: Where does the generated QR image get stored?
faq.answer: It's written into a custom property you create on the contact or company record, holding the image URL.
